title: Spinosaurus Origin
description: A massive theropod dinosaur with a distinctive sail-like structure on its back. It is believed to have had an aquatic lifestyle, primarily feeding on fish. Its unique adaptations made it well-suited for life in and around water.
body:
The Spinosaurus was a massive theropod dinosaur with a distinctive sail-like structure on its back. It is believed to have had an aquatic lifestyle, primarily feeding on fish. Its unique adaptations, such as its long, narrow snout and conical teeth, made it well-suited for life in and around water. *Origin* created by ***Chris_The_Big!*** **Pack image by [TitanusPixel55](https://www.deviantart.com/titanuspixel55/art/JP-Logo-Spinosaurus-robustus-896070855) on Deviant Art** Also try my [Baryonyx Origin](https://modrinth.com/datapack/baryonyx-origin)! ![spino](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1283aab15715e0008f7b8f3d1688c5fdbff5482_0.webp) ## Abilities:
Spoiler

Mighty Claws

You have sharp and powerful claws.

Hydration Buff

You thrive in water. Getting soaked unleashes your full potential, making you stronger.

High Lung Capacity

You only start to suffocate after a minute underwater.

Fins

Your underwater speed is increased

Like Water

When underwater, you do not sink to the ground unless you want to.

Aqua Affinity

You may break blocks as others do on land.

Scotopic Vision

You can see well in the dark.

Big Posture

You are a very big creature.

Long Legs

You can step up one block tall surfaces as if they were slabs.

Pesco-Carnivore

You're a skilled hunter, with a taste for both meat and fish.

Hunger

You have to eat more to survive.

Deadly fire

Fire is one of your major weaknesses.

Blast Weakness

You take double the damage from any kind of explosion.

Useless Equipment

Your claws make it so you can't use shields effectively. You don't rely on wings for hunting. And you also can't use Bows or Crossbows.
